{{Quote|A Jedi whose lightsaber is guided by the Force need not fear the outcome of any battle.|Anoon Bondara|<ref name="DMSH" />}}
'''Anoon Bondara''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rutian/Legends|Rutian]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Bondara trained many students in [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]] when he became a [[Jedi instructor]]. He was also the [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Jedi Watchman]] for the [[Ryloth system/Legends|Ryloth system]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|When you are one with the Force, you are as nothing. A calm in the storm, a pivot to the lever. Chaos may rage around you, yet you are still.|Anoon Bondara|<ref name="DMSH" />}}
[[File:AnoonBondara-JATM.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Bondara leaps from his speeder to engage Maul and allow his companions to escape.]]

A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Anoon Bondara was [[Jedi training/Legends|instructed]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. A contemporary of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], Jedi Bondara was well respected by his peers and a noted warrior. Over the years of studying the ways of the [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]], Bondara developed such skill with a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] that he was regarded by many as the premiere practitioner of the weapon in the Order. Achieving the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], Bondara accepted the position of [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Watchman]] of the [[Ryloth system/Legends|Ryloth system]], living amongst the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]] of [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] and keeping order within the system. Eventually stepping down from this position, Bondara was nominated by the acting [[Battlemaster/Legends|Temple Battlemaster]] to become an [[Jedi instructor|instructor]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. Along with his duties at the [[Jedi academy|academy]], Bondara managed to train three [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] of his own, each one ascending to the rank of Knight to a success. Educating the likes of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] as an initiate, Bondara not only studied the lightsaber, but became a [[Jedi Weapon Master|Weapon Master]] upon his mastery of the [[Teräs Käsi/Legends|Teräs Käsi]] martial arts form.<ref name="DMSH" />

Master Bondara's fourth and final Padawan was [[Darsha Assant]], who was trained at the Temple on Coruscant as the old Twi'lek continued to teach classes there. By [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Padawan Assant had reached a point where the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] believed she could learn no more from Bondara and was ready to face the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]]. Instead of facing the traditional Trials at the Temple, the High Council assigned Assant to descend into Coruscant's [[Crimson Corridor]] and escort the [[Fondorian]] informant [[Oolth]] back to the Temple for questioning. While Bondara did not agree with the Council's decision he was compelled to allow her to go; and was on call in his quarters when a distressed Assant returned without the informant. When she detailed the Fondorian's fall into the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]], Master Bondora agreed to accompany his student in search of the body. As the pair recovered the man's body they were witness to a [[Darth Maul/Legends|tattooed]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Skirmish on Coruscant (32 BBY)|pursuing]] one [[Lorn Pavan]] and [[I-5YQ]]. Rescuing the fleeing Human and droid in the Jedi's [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]], the Jedi quickly questioned the pair as to why they were hunted. Realizing that the Zabrak was giving chase, Master Bondara left Assant at the speeder controls and leaped out the window and onto the front of the Zabrak's [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]].<ref name="DMSH" />

Activating his lightsaber, Bondara forced the assassin to crash onto a [[pedwalk]] and engaged the tattooed Zabrak in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]]. Despite Bondara's mastery of lightsaber combat, it became clear that this was a fight he was not going to win. Seeing no other option, Bondara sacrificed his own life by blowing up a [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] in an attempt to destroy his opponent in the blast. Though Bondara was killed in the explosion, the assassin, in reality the secret [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] Darth Maul, managed to escape the blast, suffering only minor damage.<ref name="DMSH" />

==Powers and abilities==
As a [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]], Anoon Bondara's skill with a lightsaber was so advanced, he had obtained the rank of Weapons Master. Along with his mastery of Teräs Käsi,<ref name="DMSH" /><ref name="POTJ">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref> the Twi'lek's preferred form was [[Form VII/Legends|Juyo]].<ref name="Jedi Academy">''[[Jedi Academy Training Manual]]''</ref> As he was [[Ambidexterity|ambidextrous]], he had some aptitude with [[Jar'Kai/Legends|Jar'Kai]].<ref name="POTJ" /> In spite of all his martial prowess, he found himself to be no match for Darth Maul, who was himself a Teräs Käsi practitioner.<ref name="DMSH" />

Apart from his swordsmanship, Bondara had some proficiency in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. He could apply the [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]], [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]],<ref name="POTJ" /><ref name="Jedi Academy" /> [[battlemind]], [[Force empathy/Legends|Force empathy]], [[Force sight]],<ref name="POTJ" /> and [[Serenity (trance)|serenity]].<ref name="Jedi Academy" />

Bondara was also skilled in the use of languages: his native [[Twi'leki/Legends|Twi'leki]] and Lekku, [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], and [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]].<ref name="POTJ" /><ref name="Jedi Academy" />

==Behind the scenes==
In both of Bondara's appearances he is described as having lightsaber skills second to none. This has led some to hypothesize that Anoon Bondara was the [[Battlemaster/Legends|Jedi Battlemaster]] prior to [[Cin Drallig/Legends|Cin Drallig]]. The information mentioned above, the fact that he was the lightsaber instructor to [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiates]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] such as Obi-Wan Kenobi, and that he died in 32 BBY, the same year Cin Drallig became Battlemaster, are cited by some to support this theory.

A [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] bearing his name, [[Bondara's Folly]], is available to players in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.
